notes: Core mechanics partially work but barrel physics are erratic, ladder climbing is unreliable, platform layout doesn't match classic DK, and the jump mechanic feels unnatural with the arc-based system making it hard to time barrel jumps.

Playable and mostly stable with working movement, ladders, hazards, hammers, scoring, and win/lose states, but physics/level accuracy are loose and it falls short of authentic Donkey Kong behavior and presentation.
